# CI

We will make this as simple as possible.  
One branch called `main` and only one (pull requests branch will be deleted).  
On every push to main i will release to dev at `beta.academeez.com`.  
When pushing a tag vX.X.X it will be released to `www.academeez.com`

## Tags

Release tags: `v1.2.3`  
Where the version is taken from the main workspace `package.json`
